description_long: This is a modern tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust pump-action mechanism and a short, thick barrel. The shotgun is equipped with a pistol grip and a skeletonized, fixed stock with visible reinforcement holes, enhancing both control and weight reduction. The fore-end is ribbed for improved grip and manipulation, and the receiver appears to be constructed from metal, likely steel or aluminum alloy. The barrel is relatively short, making it suitable for close-quarters use, and the overall design is utilitarian with minimal decorative elements. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers.
description: A matte black tactical pump-action shotgun with a pistol grip, skeletonized stock, and ribbed fore-end for enhanced grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, pistol grip, skeletonized stock, ribbed fore-end, and short barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, ribbed fore-end, and the alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the pump and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open structure of the skeletonized stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with short, thick profile and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: skeletonized fixed stock with pistol grip
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
